morning.title: Brazil turns to AI for soccer talent scouting
morning.summary: Brazil is using AI-powered scouting apps to analyze video clips and identify soccer talent.

morning.title: Jacob Andreou leads Microsoft's Copilot team
morning.summary: Jacob Andreou, a former Snap executive, is leading Microsoft's Copilot team to compete with OpenAI and Anthropic.

morning.title: Masayoshi Son questions Musk's orbital AI data centers
morning.summary: Masayoshi Son doubts the viability of Elon Musk's orbital AI data centers, citing high costs and limited benefits.

morning.title: Thriving underground economy for Claude access in China
morning.summary: A black market for Claude access has emerged in China, with 'transfer station' sites buying API tokens abroad and distributing them to users.

morning.title: Apple appeals London Court ruling over Optis patents
morning.summary: Apple is appealing a London Court ruling requiring the company to pay $502M for using Optis' wireless patents.

morning.title: Z.ai's GLM-5.2 matches US models in security bug detection
morning.summary: Z.ai's GLM-5.2 model has achieved parity with US models in detecting security bugs, raising concerns about unrestricted access to Chinese AI models.

morning.title: IBM acquires Red Hat
morning.summary: IBM has acquired Red Hat to create a leading hybrid cloud provider.

morning.title: Chinese AI startups launch Mythos-like models
morning.summary: Chinese AI startups have launched Mythos-like models, potentially challenging US restrictions on AI technology exports.

morning.title: Heat waves affect brain function
morning.summary: Research suggests that heat waves can impair brain function, with scientists working to understand the underlying mechanisms.

morning.title: IBM's chip technology extends Moore's Law
morning.summary: IBM has developed a new chip technology that could extend Moore's Law for another decade, enabling further advances in computing power.

gym.title: The smartest order to invest your money
gym.summary: A step-by-step guide to investing money, emphasizing the importance of a well-thought-out strategy.

gym.title: Build Systems, Not Code
gym.summary: A talk on the benefits of building systems rather than just writing code, with a focus on scalability and maintainability.

gym.title: The Power of Real Optimism
gym.summary: A discussion on the power of optimism, highlighting its positive effects on mental health and well-being.

gym.title: Stop Writing Tone Instructions. Layer Them.
gym.summary: A talk on the importance of layering tone instructions in AI systems, rather than writing them from scratch.

gym.title: Investing a $120 Billion Balance Sheet
gym.summary: A discussion on investing a large balance sheet, with insights from experienced investors and financial experts.

gym.title: Inside the Octagon: How AI Brings UFC’s Fastest Moments into Focus
gym.summary: A look at how AI is being used in the UFC to analyze and enhance the viewing experience of fast-paced moments.
